# 3dmodel-splats-stager

A modern, high-performance 3D object stager specializing in Gaussian Splatting models, built with Three.js and Vite. This application enables advanced visualization of 3D models with sophisticated post-processing effects and real-time parameter adjustment.

## Vega Lab Fit
- Classification: house
- Capabilities: frontend-ui, ml-ai
- House skills: repo-discovery, repo-adoption, mine-execution

## Local Setup
- Package managers: npm, pnpm, npm-lock
- Document install, dev, build, and verification commands before broad reuse.
- Keep runtime assumptions explicit; prefer local MLX/OpenResponses for model-assisted work.

## Verification
- npm run lint
- npm run test:scene
- npm run test
- npm run test:playwright
- npm run build

## Evidence

- Capabilities: frontend-ui, ml-ai
- House skills: repo-discovery, repo-adoption, mine-execution

artifacts.title: Leagentdiary README Draft
artifacts.body:
# Leagentdiary

LeAgentDiary is a version-control system for AI agents. It connects handoffs, memory, and self-reflection into one timeline—track contributions, re-summon past agents, and evolve their personas. Built with the HTDI Agentic Framework for human-AI co-development.

## Vega Lab Fit

artifacts.title: webgi-scene README Draft
artifacts.body:
# webgi-scene

A modern, high-performance 3D object stager specializing in Gaussian Splatting models, built with WebGi. This application enables advanced visualization of 3D models with sophisticated post-processing effects and real-time parameter adjustment.

## Vega Lab Fit
- Classification: house
- Capabilities: ml-ai, frontend-ui
- House skills: repo-discovery, repo-adoption, mine-execution

## Local Setup
- Package managers: npm
- Document install, dev, build, and verification commands before broad reuse.
- Keep runtime assumptions explicit; prefer local MLX/OpenResponses for model-assisted work.

## Verification
- npm run build

## Evidence
- Repository: KBLLR/webgi-scene
- Description: A modern, high-performance 3D object stager specializing in Gaussian Splatting models, built with WebGi. This application enables advanced visualization of 3D models with sophisticated post-processing effects and real-time parameter adjustment.
- Adoption kind: house
- Capabilities: ml-ai, frontend-ui
- House skills: repo-discovery, repo-adoption, mine-execution
- Finding: No test/check/lint script detected from package metadata.
